name: BigID
description: Monitor BigID data privacy and discovery platform for data source inventory, user access, and scan status

credentialFields.label: BigID Instance URL
credentialFields.helpText: Full URL of your BigID instance (e.g., https://your-company.bigid.cloud)

credentialFields.label: Username
credentialFields.helpText: BigID admin username for API access

credentialFields.label: Password
credentialFields.helpText: BigID password for the admin user

checks.name: Systems Description
checks.description: Retrieves data source connections from BigID to verify data source inventory and classification coverage

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Retrieves BigID platform users to verify access controls and user management

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Retrieves BigID scan status to verify data discovery scans are running and completing successfully
